House.Body: The day has just started yet to you it feels ruined already. You find a piece of paper written by your mother telling you to go out and buy milk for the house. *Sigh* (Thats sooooooo much work... AND I HAVE TO PAY FOR IT???) you think to yourself. ... Well time to do something I suppose.

House2.Body: It hits you as you open the front door (Oh... I was supposed to get milk...) but those thoughts come too late, you are already home, you already spent the money, and now all thats left is to face the consequences

Bedroom.Body: Your nice and... big enough bedroom... In the corner of your room, the comfy bed speaks to you in ways that you never thought possible.

Outside.Body: The summer sun beats down on you (WHY IS IT SO HOT!!!) these thoughts fill your mind as you ponder your next course of action.

Park.Body: A park full of whimsy and fun! Maybe you're a tad bit too old to play here now... but theres still fun to be had!

Park2.Body: . . .? Theres a phone on the ground... and its unlocked?

Choices.Text: First Name Joe, Last Name Mama
SIX SEVEN SKIBIDI TOILETS ON THE WALL SIX SEVEN SKIBIDI TOILETSSS!

Prank1.Body: 'What so your name is Joe Mama?' ... ... 'How did I- ... That's so d- ... ... I'm hanging up...' *click*

Prank2.Body: 'Why yes! it is indeed! WHAT A MINUTE NO NO NO' *click*

Prank3.Body: 'OH MY GOD WHY WOULD YOU EVEN SAY THAT DO YOU EVEN UNDERSTAND HOW COMPLETELY UNFUNNY THAT WAS THIS IS WHY I BEAT KIDS EVERYDAY AND-' The person on the other line continues, but you blocked them out

Shopping Center.Body: A place for shopping or something

Milk Store.Body: Ahhh Milk famous for it's milk aisle! Wait you don't have any money.... There should be some in your room
Milk Store.Body2: Ahhh Milk famous for it's milk aisle!

Arcade.Body: Oh Yeah!!! The real place of fun! Only requires you to spend all your money!!
Arcade.Body2: Oh Yeah!!! The real place of fun! Only requires you to spend all your money!!

No Play.Body: But you don't have any money...

Play.Body: YES THIS IS AWESOME!!!!!!! (and a great use of money!) The time passes and you forget why you were even outside in the first place

Drawer.Body: You search your nightstand and find . . . . !? JACKPOT!!!!! (you found $5)
Drawer.Body2: Did you think there would be more?

Sleep.Body: Yeah getting the milk is a later problem... Surely you'll be able to wake up before your mom gets home right? ...No use thinking about it! Thats then, this is now.

Good End.Body: You put the milk away in the fridge and congratulate yourself on a job well done          (Ending 1: Normal Ending)

Bad End.Body: Your mother came home and was furious! Maybe you should've just done as she asked...           (Ending 3: Sleep Ending)

Bad End2.Body: Your mother deemed you useless and decided to kick you out the house... Now you are homeless and without any milk... (STILL WORTH IT!!!)     (Ending 2: No Regrets)
